Title: Monolithic ContentView.swift blocks maintainability
Root Cause: All UI logic consolidated into single 3,671-line file with 38 @State variables
Impact: Cannot scale team; merge conflicts guaranteed; cannot test components in isolation; entire view recompiles on state change
Fix: Extract into logical components: HomeScreenView (~400 LOC), CategoryDetailOverlay (~600 LOC), TaskDetailSheet (~800 LOC), ProfileSetupSheet (~500 LOC), HelpPrivacySheets (~200 LOC), Components/ directory for reusables, Keep ContentView as 200-line coordinator

Title: Email template XSS vulnerability
Root Cause: User-controlled variables (displayName, subject, message, recipientName) interpolated directly into HTML without entity encoding
Impact: Phishing attack vector; malicious HTML can exploit email clients; brand damage; GDPR violation if data exfiltrated
Fix: Create escapeHtml() utility function to replace [&<>"'] with HTML entities; Apply to all user-controlled variables in 5 template functions: welcomeHTML, supportCreatedHTML, support_followup, maintenance_notice, broadcast_update

Title: Privilege escalation via unverified token claims
Root Cause: Admin/owner privilege checks rely on client-provided JWT token claims without server-side Firestore verification
Impact: Mass email spam; SMS abuse to arbitrary numbers; cost explosion (Twilio/SendGrid); account takeover if combined with other vulnerabilities
Fix: Replace client token checks with server-side Firestore verification against admins collection OR use Firebase Auth custom claims (set server-side); Make isPrivilegedCaller async and await in all callers (email.ts:314, sms.ts:97)

Title: Rate limit race condition
Root Cause: Firestore transaction check-and-increment is not atomic; concurrent requests can all pass check before counter increments
Impact: Rate limit bypass via parallel requests; DoS via cost (Twilio/SendGrid bills spike); spam abuse from legitimate domain
Fix: Use Firestore conditional updates with retry logic (retry up to 3 times on contention); Check BEFORE incrementing in transaction; Better alternative: Use Redis with atomic INCR operation

Title: Zero test coverage
Root Cause: No unit tests integration tests or E2E tests implemented; no test infrastructure configured
Impact: Regression risk on any change; cannot safely refactor; manual testing only; no deployment confidence; developers afraid to make changes
Fix: Phase 1: ContentData persistence tests (8h), Backend security tests (8h), Auth flow tests (6h); Phase 2: XCUITest critical flows (12h); Phase 3: Backend integration tests (10h)

Title: No CI/CD pipeline
Root Cause: All builds and deployments manual; no automated quality gates
Impact: Human error in deploys; can deploy broken code; slow releases; no rollback plan; team bottleneck (only one person knows process)
Fix: Phase 1: Create .github/workflows/ios-ci.yml with build+test (8h); Phase 2: Create backend-ci.yml with npm test+firestore rules validation (6h); Phase 3: CD for staging auto-deploy to TestFlight (8h)

Title: Weak referral code generation
Root Cause: Referral codes use Math.random() which is predictable; only ~46k possible suffixes
Impact: Referral fraud via predicted codes; low entropy; collision risk (50% at ~200 users)
Fix: Replace Math.random() with crypto.randomBytes(2).toString('hex').toUpperCase() for 65k possibilities

Title: PII (email) logged in analytics
Root Cause: User emails stored in analytics events without explicit consent
Impact: GDPR violation (Article 6); data breach risk if analytics DB compromised; cannot easily delete user email (right to erasure)
Fix: Store email domain only instead of full email: emailDomain: user.email?.split('@')[1] ?? null; Audit other PII logging

Title: No certificate pinning
Root Cause: HTTPS enforced but no certificate pinning; vulnerable to MITM with valid CA certificate
Impact: Corporate proxy MITM; compromised CA attack; user data exposure (profile, progress, auth tokens)
Fix: Implement URLSessionDelegate with public key pinning; Store Firebase API public key hashes; Validate in didReceive challenge callback

Title: Keychain tokens lack TTL management
Root Cause: Tokens stored in Keychain never expire; no timestamp stored with token
Impact: Stolen token persistence forever; cannot force re-auth; compliance risk (some regulations require periodic re-auth)
Fix: Create KeychainToken struct with expiresAt Date; Modify saveToken to accept expiresIn seconds; Auto-delete expired tokens in loadToken

Title: Bundle loading blocks main thread
Root Cause: JSON decoding on background thread but UI update on main thread is immediate
Impact: First launch jank (100-200ms freeze); ANR risk on old devices; poor first impression (white screen)
Fix: Batch UI updates with animation using withAnimation(.easeInOut); Better: implement incremental category loading (5 at a time)

Title: Notification scheduling unbounded
Root Cause: Schedules notifications for ALL incomplete tasks sequentially (50+ tasks = 5-10 seconds)
Impact: Slow refresh; UI freeze during permission flow; battery drain
Fix: Limit to 20 most urgent tasks sorted by urgency+timing; Batch requests (no await in loop); Use TaskGroup for concurrent adds

Title: Public read on referrals collection
Root Cause: Referral codes are publicly readable (allow read: if true)
Impact: Referral harvesting by bots; fraud via scraped codes; privacy leak (code contains user ID prefix)
Fix: Change to: allow read: if isSignedIn(); Require authentication to read referral codes

Title: Missing environment variable validation
Root Cause: Environment variables fall back to defaults silently
Impact: Production misconfiguration (deploy without SENDGRID_API_KEY → silent failure); debugging hell; wrong environment emails
Fix: Add validateEnvironment() function in index.ts; Check all required env vars on module load; Throw error in production if missing; Log warnings in dev

Title: Batch delete partial failure handling
Root Cause: User deletion batches subcollection deletes with Promise.all - if one fails entire operation fails
Impact: Incomplete deletion (profile deleted but subcollections remain); GDPR violation (right to erasure not honored); user confusion
Fix: Use batch.delete() with 500-doc batches; Wrap each subcollection in try/catch; Log errors but continue; Trigger retry on failure

Title: ContentData.swift too large (1249 LOC)
Root Cause: Single file handles bundle loading progress persistence merge logic validation normalization fallback
Impact: Hard to test; merge conflicts; code review overhead (1249 lines to read)
Fix: Extract into modules: BundleLoader.swift, ProgressManager.swift, ContentValidator.swift, ContentMerger.swift; Keep ContentStore as 200-line coordinator

Title: Models.swift too large (1372 LOC)
Root Cause: All data models enums sample data in single file
Impact: Slow compilation; namespace pollution (50+ types); hard to navigate
Fix: Split by domain: Task.swift (ChecklistTask enums), Category.swift, ContentSection.swift, Stats.swift, SampleData.swift

Title: 38 @State variables in ContentView
Root Cause: All state managed at top level
Impact: Performance (every state change triggers full view re-evaluation); unnecessary rerenders; hard to debug
Fix: Extract state to child view models: NavigationState (modal/overlay), ProfileState (profile sheet); Reduce to ~10 @State in ContentView

Title: UserDefaults unencrypted
Root Cause: Progress and profile data stored in plaintext UserDefaults
Impact: Device compromise exposes all local preferences; violates principle of least privilege
Fix: For sensitive data: encrypt using CryptoKit before storing OR migrate to Keychain; For non-sensitive: acceptable with device passcode

Title: No accessibility labels on interactive elements
Root Cause: Missing .accessibilityLabel() on many buttons and interactive views
Impact: VoiceOver users cannot navigate app; violates WCAG 2.1 AA; App Store may flag during accessibility review
Fix: Add .accessibilityLabel() to all Buttons; Add .accessibilityHint() where actions are non-obvious; Test with VoiceOver enabled

Title: Hardcoded color values bypass DesignSystem
Root Cause: Direct Color() calls instead of using DesignSystem.Colors
Impact: Inconsistent theming; dark mode issues; cannot update brand colors easily
Fix: Replace all hardcoded colors with DesignSystem.Colors; Add missing colors to DesignSystem if needed

Title: Firebase config validation missing
Root Cause: No validation of firebase.json structure; easy to misconfigure functions/hosting
Impact: Deploy with broken config; functions fail to deploy; hosting routes break
Fix: Add JSON schema validation; Create pre-deploy hook to validate config; Document required fields

Title: No error telemetry
Root Cause: CrashReporter.swift is placeholder only; no actual crash reporting
Impact: Cannot diagnose production crashes; no visibility into user-facing errors; slow bug fixes
Fix: Integrate Crashlytics or Sentry; Wire into SwiftUI error boundaries; Add structured error logging

Title: Inconsistent error handling
Root Cause: Mix of try/catch optional try! force-try across codebase
Impact: Silent failures; poor error messages to users; hard to debug
Fix: Standardize on Result type for recoverable errors; Use custom AppError enum; Add error telemetry

Title: Missing dependency injection
Root Cause: Singletons (.shared) and static methods throughout
Impact: Hard to test; tight coupling; cannot swap implementations
Fix: Introduce @Environment for dependency injection; Create injectable protocols; Pass dependencies via init

Title: Unsafe force unwraps
Root Cause: Multiple force unwraps (!) without nil checks
Impact: Potential crashes if assumption violated
Fix: Replace ! with guard let or if let; Add precondition() with descriptive message where force unwrap is safe

Title: Date formatting performance
Root Cause: timelinePrimaryMetric computed property recalculates on every render
Impact: Unnecessary CPU cycles; battery drain on complex calendar calculations
Fix: Cache calculation result; Invalidate only when profileStore.arrivalDate changes using @Published

Title: Animation complexity too high
Root Cause: Complex spring animations with many parameters
Impact: Hard to maintain; performance overhead; inconsistent motion
Fix: Simplify to 3-4 standard animations; Use .spring(response:dampingFraction:) for consistency

Title: Analytics write rate limits missing
Root Cause: No rate limits on analytics event creation
Impact: User can spam analytics DB; quota exhaustion; cost spike
Fix: Add: allow create: if request.rate(minutes: 1).totalWriteOps() < 100

Title: Ad policy evaluation creates objects per event
Root Cause: evaluate() creates new Date objects on every user interaction
Impact: Cumulative performance impact with many events; memory churn
Fix: Cache now.timeIntervalSince(sessionStartedAt); Use static comparison operators; Add debouncing

Title: Task cleanup on sign out missing
Root Cause: Multiple Tasks created but not cancelled on view dismissal
Impact: Memory leak if user logs out and back in; multiple task sets running
Fix: Add .onDisappear { persistProgressTask?.cancel(); bootstrapWatchdogTask?.cancel(); minuteTickerTask?.cancel() }

Title: Analytics unbounded collection growth
Root Cause: Every user interaction creates new Firestore doc in analytics/events/items/
Impact: Unlimited collection growth; Firestore quota consumed; slow queries
Fix: Implement Firestore TTL policy; Create monthly collections instead of single; Archive old events to Cloud Storage

Title: Admin check lacks caching
Root Cause: isAdmin() checks Firestore on every request (extra read operation)
Impact: Performance overhead; cost from extra reads
Fix: Cache admin status in Firebase Auth custom claims instead of Firestore lookup

Title: Firestore listener never removed
Root Cause: Listener added in init deinit never called (singleton never deallocates)
Impact: Listener stays active forever (actually acceptable for singleton); confusing code structure
Fix: Add comment explaining deinit is defensive; OR implement manual cleanup method

Title: Category filtering logic duplicated
Root Cause: visibleCategoryIndices logic duplicated in multiple places
Impact: Code duplication; inconsistent filtering; maintenance burden
Fix: Extract to computed property in ContentStore; Reuse across views

Title: No package-lock.json in git
Root Cause: package-lock.json likely in .gitignore
Impact: Inconsistent dependency versions across environments; hard to reproduce bugs
Fix: Remove package-lock.json from .gitignore; Commit to git; Update deployment docs

Title: No JSON schema validation
Root Cause: JSON files loaded without schema validation beyond type decoding
Impact: Malformed data can pass validation; runtime crashes possible
Fix: Create JSON Schema files; Add schema validation to Scripts/validate_content.swift

Title: Storage rules too permissive
Root Cause: Default storage rules may allow excessive access
Impact: Unauthorized file access; data leak risk
Fix: Audit storage.rules; Restrict to authenticated users only; Add file size limits

Title: Excessive .onChange() modifiers
Root Cause: Multiple .onChange() listeners on same state
Impact: Performance overhead; order-dependent side effects; hard to debug
Fix: Consolidate onChange logic; Use @Observable reactions where possible

Title: Profile save logic complex
Root Cause: saveProfile() has many conditional branches
Impact: Hard to test; error-prone; maintenance burden
Fix: Extract validation to separate functions; Simplify conditional logic

Title: Build script lacks error codes
Root Cause: Script exits 0 even on some failures
Impact: CI may pass despite failures; false confidence
Fix: Add proper error handling; Exit with non-zero on any failure; Add verbose logging

Title: Search performance not optimized
Root Cause: Linear search through all tasks on every keystroke
Impact: Slow search with many tasks (100+); UI lag
Fix: Debounce search input (300ms); Use indexed search; Limit results to 20

Title: Notification scheduling window too broad
Root Cause: Schedules notifications far in advance without revalidation
Impact: User completes task but still gets reminder; poor UX
Fix: Add revalidation logic before sending; Check completion status in sendQueuedNotifications

Title: App lifecycle hooks minimal
Root Cause: No didFinishLaunching equivalent; limited setup logic
Impact: Cannot run migrations; limited initialization control
Fix: Add @UIApplicationDelegateAdaptor; Implement application(_:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:)

Title: Sheet presentation performance
Root Cause: Heavy sheet content causes jank on presentation
Impact: Poor animation performance; user-visible lag
Fix: Lazy-load sheet content; Preload heavy assets; Reduce initial render complexity

Title: Inconsistent naming conventions
Root Cause: Mix of camelCase and snake_case; inconsistent acronym casing
Impact: Reduced code readability; harder for new developers
Fix: Standardize on Swift naming conventions; Create style guide; Run SwiftLint

Title: Missing code comments
Root Cause: Complex algorithms lack documentation; no function docstrings
Impact: Hard to understand code intent; slows onboarding
Fix: Add /// docstrings to public APIs; Comment complex logic; Update DEVELOPER_HANDOFF.md

Title: Magic numbers in spacing
Root Cause: Hardcoded numbers without named constants
Impact: Unclear intent; inconsistent spacing across app
Fix: Replace with named constants: DesignSystem.Spacing.small/medium/large

Title: Line count script inefficient
Root Cause: Uses multiple commands instead of single efficient approach
Impact: Slow execution; unnecessary complexity
Fix: Simplify to single git ls-files | xargs wc -l command

Title: AdCoordinator state machine implicit
Root Cause: State transitions not clearly defined
Impact: Hard to understand ad lifecycle; potential state bugs
Fix: Make state machine explicit; Document transitions; Add state validation

Title: Deployment instructions outdated
Root Cause: README doesn't match current firebase.json structure
Impact: Confusing for new developers; deployment errors
Fix: Update README with current deployment steps; Add troubleshooting section

Title: ContentSection enum too large
Root Cause: Single enum with 11 cases and custom decoding logic
Impact: Hard to understand; lots of boilerplate
Fix: Consider protocol-based approach or separate types

Title: Image assets not optimized
Root Cause: PNG images at high resolution without compression
Impact: Larger app bundle size; slower downloads
Fix: Optimize images with ImageOptim; Use appropriate @2x/@3x sizes
